---
title: "Who Will Win the World Cup?"
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
---

# Who Will Win the World Cup?

My prediction: **Argentina**

---

## Why Argentina?

- Strong recent tournament experience
- High-level attacking depth
- Tactical discipline
- Proven ability under pressure

---

## Final Prediction

**Winner:** Argentina

### Why?
They combine:
- experience
- chemistry
- elite talent

Thanks!
